matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100101 4
1 1010000 2
2 0000000 a
3 1010111 5
4 0000000 a
5 1000001 2
6 1001110 4
7 0000000 a

12 21 1011111 6

67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a
